dailyNews.description: Relatives of slain terror leader Qasem Soleimani were living in the U.S. with green cards and arrested shortly after DHS exposed major national security vetting failures.

dailyNews.description: "SNL" star Chloe Fineman sparks backlash after sharing a story about pantsing a 6-year-old boy during her time as a camp counselor, in a Vanity Fair video.

dailyNews.description: From the South Side to Rogers Park, Pastor Corey Brooks says lawlessness fueled by sanctuary policies now threatens every Chicago neighborhood equally.

dailyNews.description: Belle Burden, a Vanderbilt heiress, warns about financial red flags in marriage after her ex amassed eight figures of wealth she didn't know about.

dailyNews.description: The Fox News Lifestyle Newsletter brings you trending stories on family, travel, food, neighbors helping neighbors, pets, autos, military veterans, heroes, faith and American values.

dailyNews.title: California's $20 minimum wage for fast-food workers led to 'negative outcomes,' researchers say
dailyNews.description: California's fast-food minimum wage hike to $20 resulted in job losses, higher prices, and reduced worker hours, a University of California, Santa Cruz study suggests.

dailyNews.title: Trump's Strait of Hormuz deadline looms
dailyNews.description: The world is awaiting how President Trump will act on his threats against Iran linked to the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz. CBS News' Nancy Cordes reports.

dailyNews.title: Oil prices rise, stocks fall ahead of Trump's Tuesday deadline for Iran
dailyNews.description: "This is a potentially huge market event like no other. It's a known unknown with a clock," one investment adviser said.

dailyNews.title: Trump says "a whole civilization will die tonight" if no Iran deal
dailyNews.description: President Trump posted on social media that "a whole civilization will die tonight," adding "but I don't want that to happen, but it probably will."

dailyNews.title: What could be the impact of Trump's threats against Iran?
dailyNews.description: President Trump's threats against Iran on the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz could backfire as Iranians grapple with the ongoing war, The Free Press' Eli Lake explains.

dailyNews.title: Iranians Voice Shock and Defiance in Face of Trump’s Latest Deadline
dailyNews.description: President Trump has threatened devastating attacks if Iran does not reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Some Iranians questioned what had happened to American values.

dailyNews.title: Hegseth Likens Easter Rescue of U.S. Airman to Resurrection of Jesus Christ
dailyNews.description: President Trump also asserted that God supports the American war against Iran “because God is good, and God wants to see people taken care of.”

dailyNews.title: Trump Threatens Jail if Journalists Protect Certain Iran Sources
dailyNews.description: The president indicated he would ask an unnamed media outlet to reveal the sources behind its coverage of Iran’s successful strike on a U.S. fighter jet, and of its crew.

dailyNews.title: Trump Threatens ‘Complete Demolition’ by Midnight, and Dark Money Flows Into Midterms
dailyNews.description: Plus, a look behind the moon.

dailyNews.title: Artemis II Astronauts Head Home After Historic Journey Around the Moon
dailyNews.description: The NASA lunar flyby took the four crew members farther from Earth than any humans. They witnessed a solar eclipse and received praise in a call from President Trump.

dailyNews.title: What to Watch in the Election to Succeed Marjorie Taylor Greene in Georgia
dailyNews.description: Clay Fuller, a Republican allied with President Trump, will face Shawn Harris, a Democrat, in the election to fill the remainder of Ms. Greene’s term after her resignation from Congress.

dailyNews.title: Trump Vows to Target Iranian Civilian Infrastructure if No Deal
dailyNews.description: With just hours left before President Donald Trump’s latest deadline for Iran to strike a deal to end the war, the president is now vowing to focus on civilian infrastructure targets, but Iranians say that has already begun. NBC’s Stephanie Gosk reports for TODAY.

dailyNews.title: Trumps Threatens ‘Complete Demolition’ of Iran’s Infrastructure
dailyNews.description: As President Donald Trump’s deadline approaches, he is warning that Iran must strike a deal now to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz by Tuesday night or face dire consequences. The president also elaborated on his profane Easter Sunday social media post threatening to destroy Iran's infrastructure, saying, “Every power plant in Iran will be out of business, burning, exploding and never to be used again.” NBC’s Garrett Haake reports for TODAY.
